properties.description: Switches Electrolyzer between turned on or turned off.
Locks the Electrolyzer when set to 1. Unlocks it when set to 0.
Powers on the Electrolyzer on when set to 1. Powers off when set to 0.
Returns whether the Electrolyzer is turned on and receives power. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
Returns whether the Electrolyzer is flashing an error. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
Returns the current amount of power in Watts required by the Electrolyzer.
